name: consumption trace: when last fetch attempt failed, freshness_at_generation records stale-warn-degraded
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/provenance .claude-tdd-pro/standards-last-fetch && echo "2024-01-01T00:00:00Z" > .claude-tdd-pro/standards-last-fetch/x.txt && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/consumption-trace.sh" --commit-sha abc123 --consulted x --now 2026-05-13T12:00:00Z --emit "$PWD/.claude-tdd-pro/provenance/abc123.json" && grep "stale-warn-degraded" .claude-tdd-pro/provenance/abc123.json 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
